action.reasoning: Observation: Resume failed due to dim_ff mismatch (checkpoint has 1536, script tried 2048). Only ~50 min left. Best exprate=20.5%. Analysis: Need to match checkpoint architecture exactly. Decision: Resume with correct params (dim_ff=1536), train 20 more epochs with lower LR, submit eval.
